'''rachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyathostomin|cyathostomin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyathostomin|cyathostomin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rachaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræchækæth|ræchækæth]] || [[word:ræchækæj|ræchækæj]] || [[word:ræchækæsh|ræchækæsh]] || [[word:ræchækæ|ræchækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rachachakath|rachachakath]] || [[word:rachachakaj|rachachakaj]] || [[word:rachachakash|rachachakash]] || [[word:rachachaka|rachachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rachakath|rachakath]] || [[word:rachakaj|rachakaj]] || [[word:rachakash|rachakash]] || [[word:rachaka|rachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rachafkath|rachafkath]] || [[word:rachafkaj|rachafkaj]] || [[word:rachafkash|rachafkash]] || [[word:rachafkaf|rachafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rachakatha|rachakatha]] || [[word:rachakaja|rachakaja]] || [[word:rachakasha|rachakasha]] || [[word:rachakaka|rachakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rachakath|rachakath]] || [[word:rachakaj|rachakaj]] || [[word:rachakash|rachakash]] || [[word:rachaka|rachaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rachakathal|rachakathal]] || [[word:rachakajal|rachakajal]] || [[word:rachakashal|rachakashal]] || [[word:rachakakal|rachakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rachakathatha|rachakathatha]] || [[word:rachakajaja|rachakajaja]] || [[word:rachakashasha|rachakashasha]] || [[word:rachakaka|rachakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rachakathan|rachakathan]] || [[word:rachakajan|rachakajan]] || [[word:rachakashan|rachakashan]] || [[word:rachakakan|rachakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rachakathaoro|rachakathaoro]] || [[word:rachakajaoro|rachakajaoro]] || [[word:rachakashaoro|rachakashaoro]] || [[word:rachakakaoro|rachakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
